data.title: Ambition enhances AI Assistant with Coaching Intelligence for revenue teams, giving managers insights for consistent coaching.
data.description: Enhancing its AI Assistant, Ambition introduced Coaching Intelligence on Feb. 18, 2026, in Chattanooga, Tenn. This enhancement provides frontline managers with valuable insights to coach consistently and execute confidently. The introduction of Coaching Intelligence marks a significant development and aims to equip managers with the necessary tools to improve coaching effectiveness.

data.title: Prevent Blindness launches third ROP Awareness Week with new data study and resources for families of children with ROP.
data.description: Prevent Blindness is currently conducting a new focus group and data study on Retinopathy of Prematurity (ROP). This initiative in Chicago offers various resources such as web pages, videos featuring medical experts, and testimonials from ROP patients and parents. The study aims to provide support to families dealing with ROP. The focus group examines the impact and prevalence of ROP, while the resources offered aim to educate and assist families. This program includes insights from medical professionals and firsthand experiences from those directly affected by ROP. This effort is part of Prevent Blindness' ongoing commitment to address ROP, a condition that affects approximately 14,000-16,000 premature babies born annually in the United States.

data.title: Study finds Gaples Institute course boosts nutrition knowledge & counseling confidence in Harvard Med students. Offers scalable model for medical education.
data.description: A new, flexible program has been introduced to enhance nutrition education in medical training programs. The initiative is designed to address the significant impact of diet-related chronic diseases on the U.S. healthcare system. Currently, physicians receive minimal training in nutrition, despite the growing concern over this issue. The program aims to change this trend by providing a scalable model that can be easily integrated into existing medical training curricula. The implementation of this program is crucial, as it can help reduce the burden of diet-related diseases on the healthcare system.

data.title: Saudi-backed A.I. firm Humain invests $3 billion in Elon Musk's xAI, acquired by SpaceX, before the deal.
data.description: Humain, founded by Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman in the previous year, disclosed that it had made an investment shortly before xAI was purchased by SpaceX, Elon Musk's aerospace company.

data.title: Up to 20% of physical US jobs could be disrupted by AI and robotics; transportation and logistics most vulnerable.
data.description: Generative AI is revolutionizing software and white-collar services, but the physical economy faces an even greater disruption as automation is set to transform transport, logistics, and manufacturing. Oxford Economics economist Nico Palesch predicts that up to 20% of the U.S. workforce could be affected by robotics within the next decade or two. Transport and logistics have the highest exposure to automation, with over 50% of jobs at risk. Manufacturing follows with 51.1% of jobs vulnerable. Retail, wholesale, accommodation, catering, and extraction sectors also face significant risk. Palesch warns of potential structural unemployment as workers displaced by automation may struggle to find new roles. This trend could reshape the job market in the coming years.

data.title: SugarCRM has been named to the Constellation ShortList for Revenue Intelligence, recognizing its AI-powered tools for revenue growth.
data.description: In San Francisco, SugarCRM, a renowned provider of an advanced sales automation platform, has recently been recognized for its excellence by being included in the Constellation ShortList™ for Revenue Intelligence. This list showcases top companies worth considering for technology investments and aims to assist customers in navigating evolving requirements and preferences. Through AI-powered tools, Revenue Intelligence by SugarCRM efficiently enhances revenue growth for customers. This acknowledgment reaffirms SugarCRM's commitment to driving success in the industry.

data.title: Canary Capital introduces 5th crypto ETF with the Canary Staked SUI ETF on Nasdaq.
data.description: A new crypto ETF has been introduced by Canary Capital in Brentwood, Tennessee. This marks their fifth ETF in this sector, known as the Canary Staked SUI ETF. Interested investors can now access this ETF on the Nasdaq exchange.

data.title: EuroDry Ltd. will release Q4 2025 results on Feb 19, 2026, after market closes in NY. Company operates drybulk vessels.
data.description: EuroDry Ltd., a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol EDRY, specializing in owning and operating drybulk vessels for transporting drybulk cargoes, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2025 on February 19, 2026. This revelation will occur after the closure of the market in New York. Based in Athens, Greece, EuroDry is a major player in the seaborne transportation industry.

data.title: Dental Expert Terrance O'Keefe of Penfield, NY, discusses toothaches in a HelloNation article. Feb 18, 2026.
data.description: In Penfield, NY on February 18, 2026, Dental Expert Dr. Terrance O'Keefe discusses dealing with persistent toothaches in a HelloNation article. The article provides guidance on identifying signs of critical tooth issues and offers solutions for addressing them effectively.

data.title: Broad Arrow to partner with The Quail for 2026 Monterey Car Week auction, featuring 175 collector cars on August 13-14.
data.description: Broad Arrow will partner with The Quail, A Motorsports Gathering for its 2026 Monterey Car Week auction after four years at the Monterey Jet Center. The two-day sale is scheduled for August 13 and 14, 2026, in Carmel Valley, California. Motorlux, the opening night event, will take place at the Monterey Jet Center on August 12. The auction will showcase around 175 collector cars of various marques, periods, and genres, as Broad Arrow expands its global presence. More information can be found at broadarrowauctions.com.

data.title: TG-17, Inc. changes name to Our Bond, Inc. to align with global sales expansion for AI-powered security platform.
data.description: The company's name change signifies its ongoing commitment to expanding awareness of its AI-driven preventive personal security platform. This shift highlights the company's dedication to enhancing understanding of its innovative technology.

data.title: Vystar Corp (OTCQB: VYST) from Worcester, MA, launches 2-week sweepstakes for collectibles on GoPaid platform.
data.description: In Worcester, Massachusetts on February 18, 2026, Vystar Corporation (OTCQB: VYST) disclosed plans to enhance recognition for the GoPaid platform and its collectibles ecosystem, focusing on the tokenization of collectibles. The company, known for its eco-friendly products and collectibles monetization, will launch a free sweepstakes for a duration of two weeks to boost awareness.
